name: paper-to-course
description: Transform academic papers into interactive HTML courses, Markdown notes, and PPTX slides.

interface.shortDescription: Turn papers into HTML courses, notes, and slides.
interface.longDescription: Paper to Course helps Codex convert a research paper into a self-contained interactive HTML course, a Markdown study document, and a PPTX presentation for seminars or teaching.
defaultPrompt: Turn this paper into a course.
Generate notes and slides for this paper.
